rejected_candidates.title: Cross-chain liquidation health check uses stale seize amount as synthetic borrow
rejected_candidates.reason: Duplicate of existing F-013 (same root cause and affected logic).

rejected_candidates.title: Cross-chain liquidation execute lacks borrower debt validation before seize
rejected_candidates.reason: Not independently reportable: liquidation initiation on the debt chain already requires an existing cross-chain borrow record and bounded repay amount before sending execute message.

rejected_candidates.title: Unchecked array bounds in claimLend can cause out-of-gas DOS
rejected_candidates.reason: Permissionless caller choosing huge arrays mainly self-DoSes their own transaction; no durable protocol-wide DoS state change is created.

rejected_candidates.title: setCrossChainRouter allows immediate router swap without timelock
rejected_candidates.reason: Governance/trust-model concern (owner power), not a code-level vulnerability under assumed privileged-owner model.

rejected_candidates.title: Cross-chain repay allows partial repay of already-removed collateral
rejected_candidates.reason: Insufficient evidence of a concrete exploit path from current code; described inconsistency is speculative without a demonstrated reachable state transition.
